---
title: "Thomasine Septima De Winton"
---

## Thomasine Septima De Winton

**Dates:** (b.1828)

**Maiden name:** (Collinson)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. John Collinson

### Biography

One of the daughters of the Rev. John Collinson, Rector of Boldon, wife of the Ven. Henry de Winton (1823/4-1895), Archdeacon of Brecknock, sister of Sophia Jane (Collinson) Harrison.  CMY’s connection with these families is described in Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 31-3;  and in her account of the fiction of Mrs Julia Stretton in <i>Women Novelists of Queen Victoria’s Reign</i>.  [LG 1952; ODNB T.E. Harrison; 1871 census]

### Letters

- Letter from June 1st [?1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
